title: Service is stopping successfuly but reported as failed on systemd status.
body:
Podman generated service menu has `ExecStop` as below:
```
ExecStop=/usr/bin/podman stop --ignore --cidfile=%t/%n.ctr-id
ExecStopPost=/usr/bin/podman rm -f --ignore --cidfile=%t/%n.ctr-id
```
I don't know technically but why there is no `podman stop` on quadlet?  Is this the reason why I am getting this service failed while stopping?

```
systemctl --user status syncthing.service 
× syncthing.service - Syncthing container
     Loaded: loaded (/var/home/queeup/.config/containers/systemd/syncthing.container; enabled-runtime; vendor preset: disabled)
     Active: failed (Result: exit-code) since Sat 2022-06-04 16:50:48 +03; 1h 27min ago
   Main PID: 9729 (code=exited, status=129)
        CPU: 5.968s

Haz 04 16:50:48 fedora systemd-syncthing[9729]: [cont-finish.d] executing container finish scripts...
Haz 04 16:50:48 fedora systemd-syncthing[9729]: [cont-finish.d] done.
Haz 04 16:50:48 fedora systemd-syncthing[9729]: [s6-finish] waiting for services.
Haz 04 16:50:48 fedora systemd-syncthing[9729]: [s6-finish] sending all processes the TERM signal.
Haz 04 16:50:48 fedora podman[10188]: 2022-06-04 16:50:48.432954886 +0300 +03 m=+0.051598633 container died 1212e13e1fb1032d49e32>
Haz 04 16:50:48 fedora podman[10188]: 2022-06-04 16:50:48.512358191 +0300 +03 m=+0.131001861 container remove 1212e13e1fb1032d49e>
Haz 04 16:50:48 fedora systemd[951]: syncthing.service: Main process exited, code=exited, status=129/n/a
Haz 04 16:50:48 fedora systemd[951]: syncthing.service: Failed with result 'exit-code'.
Haz 04 16:50:48 fedora systemd[951]: Stopped syncthing.service - Syncthing container.
Haz 04 16:50:48 fedora systemd[951]: syncthing.service: Consumed 5.968s CPU time.
```

comments.body:
> I don't know technically but why there is no podman stop on quadlet? 

`podman rm` will also stop the container.

> Is this the reason why I am getting this service failed while stopping?

Please provide a reproducer.
I will try to reproduce this with merged quadlet. I am closing this issue now. I will re open and provide reproducer if necessary.
